emails.subject: Elizabeth Shim
emails.body: Was Elizabeth Shim on the list? I can't remember. Mike

emails.subject: RE: Elizabeth Shim
emails.body: RE: Elizabeth Shim she was not. do you need to see the list again to know where to rank her? To: Slone, Jeanie

emails.subject: RE: Elizabeth Shim
emails.body: Please place her at 60 or below. She is under a performance review plan and has been removed from Trading Track. Zack McCarroll started with the west desk two weeks ago. Do we need to add him to the list? Thanks, Mike To: Grigsby, Mike

emails.subject: RE: Elizabeth Shim
emails.body: yes if you have an idea of where he should go? did he come from another rotation in trading? To: Slone, Jeanie

emails.subject: RE: Elizabeth Shim
emails.body: He came over from Broadband. We think this guy is great. We would like to rank him high enough to keep. Try 40 and higher. Thanks, Mike To: Grigsby, Mike

emails.subject: Elizabeth Shim
emails.body: Patti Sullivan informed me that the Logistics group performed a PRC last week and ranked Elizabeth Shim to be fired from Enron. I do not believe Elizabeth Shim is there employee to rank for termination. Until last week, Elizabeth Shim was in the Trading Track program on loan to Bob Hall and logistics. If they were trying to meet quota by terminating Elizabeth, then I think they need to look elsewhere. The Trading group should be making the decision on whether or not we fire Trading Track employees. We just put Elizabeth on a performance plan and ranked her in the Associate/Analyst PRC on Monday. Let me know, Mike Grigsby
